steps.title: Control the Center From the Flanks
steps.text: The English (1.c4) is a flexible opening championed by top players. Instead of rushing to push d4, White prepares it with c-pawn support and develops pieces first. Games often transpose into Queen's Gambit or Indian structures.

steps.title: Flexible Follow-ups
steps.text: Depending on Black's reply, White can play d4 (transposing to Queen's Gambit), Nc3 + g3 (positional Botvinnik-style), or e3 (flexible). The English is a great choice if you dislike memorizing sharp theory.
